__fixture__.name: remote_conditional_conflict
__fixture__.scenario: User saves a file on a remote-agent mount. The save mode is conditional_remote_write; the pipeline sends the write with an If-Match precondition on the recorded revision token. The remote responded with a precondition-failed status because another client advanced the revision. The pipeline raises a save_conflict, surfaces the conflict affordances, and does not retry without resolution.

failure_detail: remote_precondition_failed: If-Match W/"40-8b20" observed W/"41-8b21"; remote advanced the revision by one client since open
